message:
test(hostcall_s3_fifo): add 9 tests for public API coverage gaps

Cover config clamping/defaults, live_depth calculation, telemetry
counter accuracy, owner_live_counts tracking, HitMain reordering,
ghost queue capacity eviction, live_capacity enforcement, and
S3FifoDecision field accuracy. Total: 6→15 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
